channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Saudi nuclear deal in doubt as Trump adds new condition regarding Israel
item.dc:creator: Michael Birnbaum, Evan Halper
item.description: A day after the agreement was signed, the president laid out a new requirement: that the Saudis normalize relations with Israel.

item.title: House votes to limit Trump on Iran; Senate fails to advance similar measure
item.dc:creator: Noah Robertson, Mariana Alfaro, Theodoric Meyer
item.description: The votes marked the first test of Republican support for the conflict since President Donald Trump resumed military strikes against Tehran this month.

item.title: Oil prices leap to $100 a barrel after attacks in Red Sea
item.dc:creator: Victoria Craw, John Hudson, Imogen Piper
item.description: The price of Brent crude, now up about 40 percent this month, surged Thursday after Iran’s Houthi allies in Yemen claimed strikes on Saudi tankers.

item.title: E.U. imposes more sanctions on Russia, in compromise deal
item.dc:creator: Ellen Francis
item.description: European Union members are looking to keep up pressure on Russia as Ukraine’s outlook improves, even as some countries seek exemptions.

item.title: Why is Zelensky firing top leaders as Ukraine’s outlook improves?
item.dc:creator: David Stern, Steve Hendrix, Serhii Korolchuk
item.description: Amid battlefield gains, President Volodymyr Zelensky removed popular officials in a major shake-up.

item.title: Latest combat deaths show risk has shifted to troops far from Iran’s borders
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp, Alex Horton, Aaron Schaffer
item.description: Trump flew to Delaware to honor soldiers killed in the Iran war, which has proved deadly for those far from the front lines.

item.title: Hegseth says Iran war has cost $37.5 billion, defends request for more
item.dc:creator: Noah Robertson, Ellen Francis, Victoria Craw
item.description: Some lawmakers appeared frustrated as they sought clarity on the Trump administration’s strategy for the conflict amid renewed hostilities and a $67 billion funding request.

item.title: Death of Moroccan man in Italian police custody sparks protests, violence
item.dc:creator: Anthony Faiola
item.description: The death of Abderrahim Fakir in Italy drew parallels to the death of George Floyd.

item.title: Zelensky ousts Ukraine’s military commander as major shake-up continues
item.dc:creator: Serhii Korolchuk, Catherine Belton, David Stern, Joshua Yang
item.description: The dismissal of Gen. Oleksandr Syrsky came days after the Ukrainian president fired Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

item.title: Trump meets with Lebanese leader, pledges support for peace efforts with Israel
item.dc:creator: Michael Birnbaum
item.description: The event marked the White House’s latest attempt to broker an Israeli pullout from southern Lebanon, where Israel has been fighting Hezbollah.
